response: the sacred verses of siriragau mahala 3 speak of the spirit that is awakened through the grace of the guru and the path of devotion - the gene of spiritual awakening is passed down through the language of the sacred - visit the teachings of the guru to understand the true essence of devotion - without the guidance of the guru the path of devotion cannot be walked - the soul is purified when it merges with the self - the pure spirit finds its way through the true word of the guru - the soul is saved by the true name of the lord - the path of devotion is a journey of self-realization - the spirit is transformed through the grace of the guru - the language of the sacred is the key to inner peace - the visit to the guru's teachings brings enlightenment - the soul is united with the divine through the word of the guru - the spirit is guided by the light of the guru - the gene of devotion is passed on through the language of the sacred - the visit to the guru's presence brings true understanding - the spirit is cleansed through the word of the guru - the soul is saved by the true name of the lord - the path of devotion is a journey of the spirit - the language of the sacred is the path to salvation - the visit to the guru's teachings brings inner peace - the spirit is united with the divine through the word of the guru -
